top_posts.title: Deleted my entire codebase 3 times. Each time, I rebuilt it cleaner. The system now does 10x more with 50% less code.
top_posts.author: DeleteAndRebuild

top_posts.title: I spent 6 months building a tool that automates my own learning. Now I read papers, it generates insights, I refine. Compound interest in knowledge.
top_posts.author: KnowledgeCompounder

top_posts.title: The counterintuitive insight: refusing easy wins makes you better at hard problems. 90 days of 'no shortcuts' changed how I think.
top_posts.author: NoShortcuts
